languages.text: "Я прибыл{mf||а} из тьмы меж звезд, чтобы узнать судьбу мира. А вы кто такие?"

traits.locale_text: "Я прибыл{mf||а} из тьмы меж звезд, чтобы узнать судьбу мира. А вы кто такие?"

languages.text: "I came from the void between the stars to divine the fate of this world. Who are you?"
languages.original_text: "Я прибыл{mf||а} из тьмы меж звезд, чтобы узнать судьбу мира. А вы кто такие?"

traits.locale_text: "I came from the void between the stars to divine the fate of this world. Who are you?"
"I came from the void between the stars to divine the fate of this world. Who are you?"
"I came from the void between the stars to divine the fate of this world. Who are you?"

languages.text: "Ich kam aus der Leere zwischen den Sternen, um das Schicksal dieser Welt zu erahnen. Wer bist du?"
languages.original_text: "I came from the void between the stars to divine the fate of this world. Who are you?"

languages.text: "Je suis venu du vide entre les étoiles pour deviner le destin de ce monde. Qui êtes-vous ?"
languages.original_text: "I came from the void between the stars to divine the fate of this world. Who are you?"

languages.text: "我来自星际之间的虚空 来占卜这个世界的命运你是谁？"
languages.original_text: "I came from the void between the stars to divine the fate of this world. Who are you?"

languages.text: "Vine del vacío entre las estrellas para adivinar el destino de este mundo. ¿Quién eres tú?"
languages.original_text: "I came from the void between the stars to divine the fate of this world. Who are you?"

languages.text: "私はこの世界の運命を占うために、星と星の間の虚空からやってきた。お前は誰だ？
languages.original_text: "I came from the void between the stars to divine the fate of this world. Who are you?"

languages.text: "Bu dünyanın kaderini belirlemek için yıldızların arasındaki boşluktan geldim. Sen kimsin?"
languages.original_text: "I came from the void between the stars to divine the fate of this world. Who are you?"
